chinese_text: 民之饑，以其上食稅之多，是以饑。
translation_text: The people suffer from famine because of the multitude of taxes consumed by their superiors. It is through this that they suffer famine.
translation_text_raw: The people suffer from famine because of the multitude of taxes consumed by their superiors. It is through this that they suffer famine.

chinese_text: 民之難治，以其上之有為，
translation_text: The people are difficult to govern because of the (excessive) agency of their superiors (in governing them).
translation_text_raw: The people are difficult to govern because of the (excessive) agency of their superiors (in governing them).

translation_text: It is through this that they are difficult to govern.
translation_text_raw: It is through this that they are difficult to govern.

chinese_text: 民之輕死，以其上求生之厚，
translation_text: The people make light of dying because of the greatness of their labours in seeking for the means of living.
translation_text_raw: The people make light of dying because of the greatness of their labours in seeking for the means of living.

translation_text: It is this which makes them think light of dying.
translation_text_raw: It is this which makes them think light of dying.

chinese_text: 夫唯無以生為者，是賢於貴生。
translation_text: Thus it is that to leave the subject of living altogether out of view is better than to set a high value on it.
translation_text_raw: Thus it is that to leave the subject of living altogether out of view is better than to set a high value on it.
